calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Jul-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Rauch for Craig Van Pelt (Administrator).

The Court noted that there were a number of issues raised by the Probate Examiner and that over 75% of the statutory fees are being requested which is not ordinarily allowed. Mr. Rauch clarified that a preliminary distribution of $1,300,000.00 is what he is seeking at this point, stated that it is fine if the commissions and fees are granted in an amount of 75% of the statutory fees, that he is fine if the costs for which the Examiner has questions about is denied or stricken, and that he is willing to clear up the St. Mary's creditor's claim at final distribution. The Court granted the Petition for Preliminary Distribution in part (revised order signed in open Court).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
